====Pokémon Evolutions====
[[File:Lucas Evolutions.png|thumb||250px|Lucas in [[Pokémon Evolutions]]]]
Lucas appeared in ''[[PE05|The Rival]]''. In flashbacks, he was shown choosing {{p|Chimchar}} as his [[first partner Pokémon]] at [[Lake Verity]] and using it to defeat a wild {{p|Starly}} alongside {{ga|Barry}}, before later helping Barry battle [[Team Galactic]] at the [[Spear Pillar]].

Infernape's only known move is {{m|Close Combat}}.}}
